calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants Israel Taswell, Sf Green Cab, Llc'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brendan Way of Scarlet Law Group telephone number 415-352-6264 for Plaintiff.
C. Martin Gibson of Gibson Law Offices telephone number 415-883-0166 for Defendant Luxor Cab.
Joseph Breall of Breall & Breall LLP telephone number 415-345-0545 for Defendants SF Green Cab and Israel Taswell.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, Defendants Israel Taswell and SF Green Cab, LLC'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement is taken under submission.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC.
Off Calendar Dec-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANTS ISRAEL TASWELL, SF GREEN CAB, LLC'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC. is continued to January 6, 2015 to give the opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 28, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)
